commands: bash -c 'set -e; echo "=== RESIZING FILESYSTEM ==="; growpart /dev/nvme0n1 1 || true; resize2fs /dev/root || resize2fs /dev/nvme0n1p1 || true; df -h /; echo "=== PRUNING DOCKER ==="; docker system prune -af --volumes; echo "=== BUILDING CONTAINERS ==="; cd /home/ubuntu/surf-ai-system/infra; docker-compose build; echo "=== STARTING CONTAINERS ==="; docker-compose up -d; echo "=== STATUS REPORT ==="; sleep 2; docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}"; curl -s -f http://localhost:8000/health && echo "API_OK" || echo "API_FAIL"; curl -s -f http://surfing.heyi.co.il/api/health && echo "DOMAIN_OK" || echo "DOMAIN_FAIL"'
